title: Group photos for diplomas and end of preschool year 2025/26
requirements: Festive attire. Girls should bring dresses, and boys should be equipped with long, elegant trousers and a white collared shirt (polo type is also acceptable).
notes: The festive attire will be useful for all children, as on this day the 'Smyki' will watch a play by Teatr Kulturka. Our '0' class will also have photos taken in gowns and mortarboards.
